 {"id":"bd-2qbx.4","title":"Guided Tour System","description":"Step-by-step onboarding walkthroughs.

## Requirements
- Tour definition with steps
- Highlight target widget
- Next/Back/Skip navigation
- Completion tracking

## Implementation
- Tour struct with TourStep list
- Spotlight overlay widget
- TourProgress in app state

## Tests
- Tour navigation flow
- Highlight rendering
- Completion persistence

## Acceptance Criteria
- Deliver the behavior implied by the title: Guided Tour System
- Alien Artifact: define invariants + failure modes; if heuristics exist, specify an explainable decision rule (evidence ledger / Bayes factors where applicable)
- Extreme Optimization: baseline -> profile -> opportunity matrix; for each perf change include an isomorphism proof + golden output checksums
- Unit tests: happy path + edge cases + regression fixtures; add property tests for core invariants where applicable
- E2E: scripts with verbose JSONL logging (env, capabilities, timings, seed, checksums) + deterministic mode

 {"id":"bd-2qbx.5","title":"Help Search and Index","description":"Searchable index across all help content.

## Requirements
- Full-text search in help entries
- Fuzzy matching
- Result ranking
- Jump to relevant widget

## Implementation
- HelpIndex with inverted index
- search(query) returning ranked results
- Cmd to focus result widget

## Success Criteria
- Sub-100ms search response
- Fuzzy matching works
- Jump navigates correctly

## Acceptance Criteria
- Deliver the behavior implied by the title: Help Search and Index
- Alien Artifact: define invariants + failure modes; if heuristics exist, specify an explainable decision rule (evidence ledger / Bayes factors where applicable)
- Extreme Optimization: baseline -> profile -> opportunity matrix; for each perf change include an isomorphism proof + golden output checksums
- Unit tests: happy path + edge cases + regression fixtures; add property tests for core invariants where applicable
- E2E: scripts with verbose JSONL logging (env, capabilities, timings, seed, checksums) + deterministic mode

 {"id":"bd-2qbx.6","title":"Contextual Help E2E Test Suite","description":"## Purpose
End-to-end validation of contextual help system functionality.

## Test Scenarios

### 1. Tooltip Behavior (help_tooltip_e2e.rs)
- Tooltip appears on focus
- Correct positioning at edges
- Auto-dismiss on blur
- Multi-line content

### 2. Keybinding Hints (help_keybind_e2e.rs)
- Context-appropriate shortcuts
- Global shortcuts always visible
- Format correctness
- Update on focus change

### 3. Guided Tours (help_tour_e2e.rs)
- Tour step progression
- Target highlighting
- Navigation (next/back/skip)
- Completion tracking

### 4. Help Search (help_search_e2e.rs)
- Full-text search accuracy
- Fuzzy matching
- Result ranking
- Jump to widget

### 5. Accessibility (help_a11y_e2e.rs)
- Screen reader announcements
- Keyboard navigation
- Help panel focus management
- High contrast mode

## Logging Requirements
- INFO: Help activations with widget context
- DEBUG: Search queries and results
- TRACE: Tour step transitions
- Metric: Help engagement rate

## Script Location
scripts/e2e/help_system/

## Acceptance Criteria
- Deliver the behavior implied by the title: Contextual Help E2E Test Suite
- Alien Artifact: define invariants + failure modes; if heuristics exist, specify an explainable decision rule (evidence ledger / Bayes factors where applicable)
- Extreme Optimization: baseline -> profile -> opportunity matrix; for each perf change include an isomorphism proof + golden output checksums
- Unit tests: happy path + edge cases + regression fixtures; add property tests for core invariants where applicable
- E2E: scripts with verbose JSONL logging (env, capabilities, timings, seed, checksums) + deterministic mode

","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"subtask","created_at":"2026-02-05T15:04:37.174123305Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-05T17:19:30.290612118Z","closed_at":"2026-02-05T17:19:30.290594244Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo-showcase","e2e","mermaid","subtask"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2rfpz","depends_on_id":"bd-1k26f","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-05T15:04:48.907099345Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2rfpz","depends_on_id":"bd-zc0d7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-05T15:04:49.175451486Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":757,"issue_id":"bd-2rfpz","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Implemented JSONL schema validation and hash verification:
- pty_mermaid_harness_jsonl_schema: validates mermaid_harness_start (8 required fields + value checks), mermaid_frame (run_id consistency, monotonic indices, sequential sample_idx, field presence), mermaid_harness_done (total_frames, run_id)
- pty_mermaid_harness_metrics_jsonl_present: validates mermaid_render events from screen metrics logging (schema_version, sample, layout_mode, tier, glyph_mode)
- pty_mermaid_harness_different_seeds_differ: verifies different seeds produce different run_ids
- Enhanced pty_mermaid_harness_deterministic_hashes with first-divergence reporting including seed/cols/rows context
- Total: 5 PTY tests passing, clippy clean","created_at":"2026-02-05T17:17:55Z"}]}
